name: USS Widgeon (ASR 1)
events: 12 Aug 1944 On completed of the night exercises, USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. F.W. Scanland, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Carlson (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Stapleton, USNR) and USS Greiner (Lt.Cdr. L.H. Kiser, USN). USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN) joined for torpedo recovery duties.
16 Aug 1944 USS Baya (Cdr. A.H. Holtz, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN) and USS ATR-80 (Lt. J.P. Debrule, USNR).
2 Sep 1944 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Canfield (Lt.Cdr. P.E. Cherry, USNR) and USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN).

28 Sep 1944 USS Tambor (T/Cdr. W.J. Germershausen, Jr., USN) and USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Tisdale (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Hatfield, USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN).
USS Tambor remained out for night exercises with USS Le Hardy and USS Fleming (Lt. K.F. Burgess, Jr., USNR).

2 Oct 1944 USS Halibut (T/Cdr. I.J. Galantin, USN), USS Pogy (T/Lt.Cdr. P.G. Molteni, Jr., USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Allen (Lt. J.A. Rowe, USNR), USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Manlove (Lt. E.P. Foster, Jr., USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN).

3 Oct 1944 USS Tuna (T/Cdr. E.F. Steffanides, Jr., USN), USS Pogy (T/Lt.Cdr. P.G. Molteni, Jr., USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Allen (Lt. J.A. Rowe, USNR), USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Fleming (Lt. K.F. Burgess, Jr., USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN).
